dc_description: A paved two-lane rural road curves through dry, golden hills under a clear blue sky. On the right shoulder, several traffic signs warn of slippery road conditions and wildlife crossing for the next 3 km, with additional circular signs indicating a 50 speed limit and another restriction marked 40.0. Dry grass, shrubs, a stone retaining wall, and scattered trees line the roadside.
novel_visual_observations: Two triangular warning signs on the right are stacked vertically, each paired with a rectangular distance panel reading "3 km".
The landscape is dominated by parched yellow grassland with only small patches of green shrubs and trees.
location_name: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Siena
rich_context: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, 53025, Italia
